name: Cyrus the Great
role: Founder, Achaemenid Empire (559–530 BCE)
quote: I am Cyrus, king of the universe, the great king, the powerful king, king of Babylon, king of Sumer and Akkad... When I entered Babylon in peace... I did not allow anyone to terrorize the land.

name: Darius I the Great
role: Achaemenid Emperor (522–486 BCE)
quote: By the favor of Ahura Mazda I am of such a sort that I am a friend to right, I am not a friend to wrong. It is not my desire that the weak man should have wrong done to him by the mighty.

name: Ardashir I
role: Founder, Sassanid Dynasty (224–241 CE)
quote: Know that kingship and religion are twin brothers, one cannot exist without the other. Religion is the foundation of kingship, and kingship is the protector of religion.

name: Khosrow I Anushirvan
role: Sassanid Emperor, 'The Just' (531–579 CE)
quote: The state rests upon the army, and the army upon money, and money upon taxation, and taxation upon agriculture. Whoever ruins agriculture ruins the state.

name: Shah Ismail I
role: Founder, Safavid Dynasty (1501–1524)
quote: I am the representative of God and the shadow of God on earth... whoever disobeys me, I will punish in this world and the next.

name: Shah Abbas I (the Great)
role: Safavid Emperor, Golden Age (1587–1629)
quote: If I had a servant who served me faithfully but then rebelled, I would still remember his service and be merciful — but I must also be just. Isfahan is the heart of my empire and must reflect the glory of Persia.

name: Nader Shah Afshar
role: Founder, Afsharid Dynasty (1736–1747)
quote: My sword will conquer where my words fail. From Khorasan to Delhi, the name of Persia will be feared and respected.

name: Reza Shah Pahlavi
role: Founder, Pahlavi Dynasty; Shah of Iran (1925–1941)
quote: Iran must become modern. We must build roads, railways, factories, and universities. The old ways of the mullahs and the tribal khans will not carry Iran into the twentieth century.

name: Mohammad Mosaddegh
role: Prime Minister of Iran (1951–1953); Nationalist Icon
quote: Our long years of negotiations with foreign countries have yielded no results thus far. With the oil revenues we could meet our entire budget and combat poverty, disease, and backwardness among our people.

name: Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi
role: Shah of Iran (1941–1979)
quote: I realize that the primary obligation of any government is to provide for the security and well-being of its citizens. But the revolution must and will go on — and I am going to see that it does.

name: Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini
role: Supreme Leader, Islamic Republic (1979–1989); Revolution's Founder
quote: America cannot do a damn thing against us. America is far away, separated from us by an ocean. We are not afraid of America. Our youth are not afraid of America.

name: Ali Khamenei
role: Supreme Leader of Iran (1989–present)
quote: The Zionist regime is a cancerous tumor and it will be removed. I have no doubt about that... America's crimes in the region are far greater than Israel's. America is the main criminal.

name: Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani
role: President of Iran (1989–1997); 'Practical' Pragmatist
quote: We need to be realistic about what is possible. Iran cannot remain isolated forever. We must rebuild and develop our economy, even if it requires difficult compromises.

name: Mohammad Khatami
role: President of Iran (1997–2005); Reform Movement Leader
quote: I believe in the dialogue of civilizations. We must build bridges, not walls. Iran's civilization has much to contribute to world peace if we engage rather than isolate.

name: Mahmoud Ahmadinejad
role: President of Iran (2005–2013)
quote: This regime occupying Jerusalem must vanish from the page of time. The Zionist regime is the flag bearer of violation and occupation. Our nation will shortly see Israel's annihilation.

name: Hassan Rouhani
role: President of Iran (2013–2021); JCPOA Architect
quote: The world can either see Iran as a threat or as an opportunity. We chose to be an opportunity. The nuclear deal shows that diplomacy, not war, is the answer to complex international challenges.

name: Ebrahim Raisi
role: President of Iran (2021–2024); died in helicopter crash
quote: Lifting of sanctions is not the goal; what is important for us is that the rights and interests of the Iranian nation should be secured through diplomacy... We will not allow the enemy to take advantage.

name: Masoud Pezeshkian
role: President of Iran (July 2024–present); Reformist
quote: I extend a hand of friendship to all nations. Our people are exhausted by sanctions and isolation. We need to engage with the world — not against it — while protecting Iran's dignity and rights.

name: Qasem Soleimani
role: IRGC Quds Force Commander (1997–2020); killed in US strike
quote: We are the nation of martyrdom. We are the nation of Imam Husayn. Do you know how many youths, daughters and sons, have grown up with the desire to become martyrs? America should know this.

name: Mohammad Javad Zarif
role: Foreign Minister of Iran (2013–2021); Lead JCPOA Negotiator
quote: We achieved what everybody said was impossible — a comprehensive nuclear deal. The question is whether the other side has the political will to honor it. We upheld our end; they tore it up.

name: Mir Hossein Mousavi
role: Prime Minister (1981–89); 2009 Green Movement Leader; under house arrest
quote: I will not retreat from defending the rights of the people of Iran. The movement you have started will not end with just an election — it is the beginning of a new chapter in Iran's history.

name: Jimmy Carter
role: US President (1977–1981); Iran Hostage Crisis
quote: The situation in Iran is a profound crisis. The holding of our diplomats as hostages is an act of blackmail that violates the most fundamental principles of international law... We will not yield to blackmail.

name: George W. Bush
role: US President (2001–2009); 'Axis of Evil' Speech
quote: Iran aggressively pursues these weapons and exports terror, while an unelected few repress the Iranian people's hope for freedom. States like these, and their terrorist allies, constitute an axis of evil.

name: Barack Obama
role: US President (2009–2017); JCPOA Negotiator
quote: This deal offers Iran an opportunity to take an important step to rejoin the international community, and we should seize it. We have stopped the spread of nuclear weapons in this region without firing a single shot.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President (2017–2021, 2025–present); JCPOA withdrawal, Soleimani strike
quote: The Iran deal was one of the worst and most one-sided transactions the United States has ever entered into. Iran is not the same country anymore. The sanctions are incredible. They're having a hard time.

name: Grand Ayatollah Hossein-Ali Montazeri
role: Khomeini's Designated Successor (1985–1989); Senior Reformist Cleric; demoted for criticizing 1988 executions
quote: The 1988 mass executions are the greatest crime committed in the Islamic Republic since the revolution, and history will condemn us for it. If you are ordering the execution of prisoners who have already been tried and sentenced, you are destroying the foundation of the Islamic Republic.

name: Mehdi Bazargan
role: First Prime Minister of the Islamic Republic (Feb–Nov 1979); Liberal-Islamic Nationalist
quote: We wanted rain and got a flood. We said democracy and got a system that we ourselves cannot recognize. I believe that religious freedom and political freedom are inseparable — you cannot have one without the other.

name: Shapour Bakhtiar
role: Last Prime Minister under the Shah (Jan–Feb 1979); assassinated in Paris 1991
quote: I will not deliver Iran to fanaticism. They can call me a traitor — history will judge. I would rather die than surrender the constitutional freedoms of Iran to a religious dictatorship.

name: Hassan Nasrallah
role: Secretary-General, Hezbollah (1992–2024); Iran's most powerful proxy leader; killed in Israeli airstrike Sept 27, 2024
quote: Our strength comes from our faith, our willingness to fight, and Iran's unwavering support. Israel can bomb us, America can sanction us — but the resistance will not be defeated. We have been building toward this moment for forty years.

name: Narges Mohammadi
role: Nobel Peace Prize Laureate 2023; imprisoned activist against compulsory hijab and death penalty; Evin Prison
quote: I am in prison, but I am not silent. The women of Iran are waging the most important civil rights struggle of our generation. No prison can contain their determination to be free. This revolution for life, freedom, and women's equality will win.

name: Ali Larijani
role: Speaker of Iranian Parliament (2008–2020); Former Nuclear Negotiator; Conservative Establishment
quote: Iran's strength lies in its resilience. We have withstood forty years of sanctions and pressure. Our nuclear rights are non-negotiable — we will enrich uranium within the NPT framework regardless of Western demands.

name: Mehdi Karroubi
role: Speaker of Parliament (2000–2004, 2004–2008); 2009 Green Movement Co-Leader; under house arrest since 2011
quote: What occurred in the 2009 election was a crime against the Iranian people and against the will of God. I have heard firsthand accounts of sexual abuse of detained protesters by security forces. This is a stain on the Islamic Republic that cannot be washed away.
